## SECTION 8 — This Day in History (World)
On October 4, 1957, the incredibly massive, absolutely historic, and deeply terrifying era of the Space Age officially and aggressively commenced. The Soviet Union successfully launched *Sputnik 1*, the absolute, very first artificial Earth satellite, into massive orbital flight. The incredibly massive, rhythmic radio beeps transmitted by the small, silver sphere deeply terrified the United States, absolutely shattering the American illusion of massive technological superiority and directly triggering the incredibly massive, multi-billion dollar Cold War Space Race.

On October 4, 1993, the incredibly massive, fiercely violent, and heavily pivotal Russian constitutional crisis reached absolute, military bloodshed. Russian President Boris Yeltsin, facing a massive, aggressive attempt by the heavily entrenched Supreme Soviet to impeach him, officially ordered the massive Russian military to aggressively shell and fiercely storm the heavily barricaded Russian White House (Parliament building). The incredibly massive, brutal military assault resulted in horrific casualties but absolutely consolidated Yeltsin's massive, dictatorial presidential authority over the fledgling republic.
